page_content:
Formerly: BSCI339R.

BSCI328 Special Topics in Entomology (1-4 Credits)

Lectures, seminars, mini-courses and other special instruction in various entomological subjects.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

BSCI329 Instructional Assistance Practicum (1-3 Credits)

Students serve as instructional assistants in selected undergraduate biology courses. Roles and responsibilities are determined on a course- specific basis and approved by the College Undergraduate Program Committee.

Prerequisite: Permission of CMNS-Biological Sciences UG Program. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
